A Service by HS108

CX&Identity

Branding
& Identity

Logo Identity Packaging

A brand is more than a logo. We build the full identity system — strategy, visual language, and the guidelines that keep it coherent as your company grows.

Timeline 6–10 weeks for full identity
Output Brand guidelines + all asset formats

What We Do

Identity that holds
at any scale.

CX&Identity is HS108's branding practice. We help companies establish and own a visual identity that is distinctive, coherent, and built to last — from the logo on a business card to the brand expression across a full product ecosystem.

Every engagement starts with strategy. We don't design logos in a vacuum — we understand who you're for, what you stand for, and how you need to be perceived. The visual work follows directly from that foundation.

The result is a brand system that your team can implement without us — because we build guidelines that leave nothing open to interpretation.

Deliverables

Brand Strategy

  • Brand positioning & strategy
  • Naming & messaging framework
  • Audience definition & personas
  • Competitive landscape analysis
  • Brand voice & tone guidelines

Visual Identity

  • Logo system & wordmark
  • Colour palette & type system
  • Imagery & photography direction
  • Iconography & illustration style
  • Full brand guidelines document

Applied Design

  • Packaging design & dielines
  • Stationery & print collateral
  • Environmental & signage concepts
  • Digital asset templates
  • Launch kit & brand rollout assets

How We Work

01

Discover

Brand audit, stakeholder interviews, and market analysis to understand where you are and where you need to go.

02

Define

Positioning, naming, and messaging — the strategic foundation everything visual builds from.

03

Design

Visual identity development from concepts through refinement to a complete, consistent system.

04

Deploy

Guidelines, templates, and launch assets that let your team execute the identity immediately and consistently.

Start a CX&Identity project.

Whether you're starting from scratch or rebranding an established company, tell us where you are. We'll figure out what you need.

CX&Identity at a Glance

6–10 Weeks for a full identity system
0 Templated logos — everything bespoke

Start a Project

Building more than a brand?

CX&Identity pairs with WebCanvas and Lumina.raw for a complete brand and digital presence.
